overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in winter gear exploring a snowy mountain resort. The character walks along paved roads and snow-covered slopes past modern wooden lodges, pine trees, and snow-capped peaks under bright clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain resort road with modern lodges

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved road past a large wooden lodge on the left

entered.detail: multi-story modern wooden building with large windows and balconies
low blue metal-sided structure with flat roof
tall evergreen trees lining the road and hillsides
distant mountain peaks covered in snow visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved mountain road with double yellow lines. A large modern wooden lodge stands on the left while a blue industrial building sits on the right. Tall pine trees and snow-capped mountains frame the scene under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet mountain road intersection with melting snow

events.description: character turns left at the road intersection
road surface becomes wet with puddles from melting snow

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking through the wet road surface with puddle reflections

entered.detail: multi-story pink residential building with external staircases
metal fire escape stairs attached to the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at a road intersection, leaving the large wooden lodge behind. The road surface becomes wet and reflective with melting snow puddles. A pink apartment building with external staircases becomes prominent on the right side of the frame.

events.description: character leaves the paved road and steps onto deep snow to ascend the slope

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep snow-covered slope beside the pink building, leaving footprints in the snow

entered.detail: clusters of purple flowers growing through the snow on the hillside
large boulders partially covered in snow on the left side of the slope

segments.scene_description: Leaving the road behind, the character ascends a steep snow-covered slope beside the pink apartment building. Purple wildflowers and rocky outcrops dot the snowy hillside as the building looms closer on the right. The character's boots sink into the deep snow with each step.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy ridge overlooking mountain valley with fallen logs

events.description: character crosses back over the paved road to ascend the opposite snowy slope
character passes large fallen logs beside the road while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the road and climbing the final snow slope toward the ridge with distant mountain views

entered.detail: large cut tree trunks lying beside the road
tan-colored multi-story buildings with arched doorways across the valley
low stone wall bordering the road on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses back over the road, passing large fallen logs and a stone retaining wall, then ascends the final snowy slope. Yellow residential buildings become visible across the valley to the right, while expansive snow-covered mountains dominate the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a paved mountain road into a steep, snowy ascent overlooking a valley. It begins with the character walking along a road marked by double yellow lines, flanked by a modern wooden lodge and a blue industrial building against a backdrop of pine trees and peaks. As the character turns left at an intersection, the road surface shifts to a wet, reflective texture with melting puddles, bringing a pink apartment building with external staircases into view. The scene then moves off the pavement and climbs a steep, snow-covered slope dotted with purple wildflowers and rocky outcrops, where the character's boots sink deep into the snow. Finally, the camera crosses back over the road past fallen logs and a stone wall to ascend a final ridge, revealing yellow residential buildings across the valley beneath expansive, snow-capped mountains.
